creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 202455
net/libnfs: update to 4.0.0

The patch doesn't apply:
C         libnfs/Makefile
>         rejected hunk @@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
C         libnfs/distinfo
>         rejected hunk @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
Summary of conflicts:
  Text conflicts: 2

Please base it on the latest revision.
